main.label.app_title: AI Multimodel Image Cataloging and Search System
main.window.title: OffGallery
processing.label.ai_overwrite_info: ℹ️ Overwrite off = existing data preserved
processing.msg.select_dir_stats: ⚠️ Select a directory to view statistics
processing.msg.scan_result: Found {total} images, {to_process} to process ({already} already processed)
processing.tooltip.source_dir: Read images from the selected directory
processing.tooltip.source_catalog: Read the image list from the Lightroom catalog
processing.tooltip.mode_new_only: Process only images not yet in the database
processing.tooltip.mode_new_errors: Process new images and retry previous errors
processing.tooltip.mode_reprocess_all: Reprocess all images, including already processed ones
processing.tooltip.solo_gen_ai: Update only tags, description and title (LLM) on images already in the database. Skips EXIF extraction and embedding.
processing.solo_gen_ai.warn_text: Select at least one of Tags, Description or Title in the AI Generation box.
processing.log.mode_solo_gen_ai: Reprocess all — AI Gen. Only (tags/description/title LLM only)
processing.tooltip.file_log: Writes all messages to a file in the log directory (Settings → Log Dir)
processing.tooltip.start_no_new: No new images to process. Change mode to reprocess.
processing.tooltip.start_errors: Start processing new images + retry errors
search.msg.empty_query: Enter a search query or set at least one filter.
search.placeholder.semantic_help: Search with natural language (e.g.: 'mountain with snow at sunset')
search.tooltip.sync_filter: Only images modified after last XMP sync
search.msg.duplicate_name_overwrite:
A search named "{name}" already exists.
Overwrite?
config.msg.endpoint_empty: Please enter a valid Ollama endpoint
config.info.embedding_always_active: ℹ️  CLIP and DINOv2 embeddings always active (required for semantic search and similarity)
config.warn.models_dir_change: ⚠ Change only after manually moving the Models/ folder
config.info.editors: Configure up to 3 external editors to open images from the gallery
config.msg.gpu_mps_detected: ✅ Apple Silicon GPU (MPS) available: {name} — unified CPU/GPU memory
config.msg.gpu_none: ⚠️ No GPU detected - CPU will be used (slower processing)
config.msg.gpu_no_torch: ❌ PyTorch not installed - cannot detect GPU
config.check.bioclip_enabled: Use BioCLIP in batch processing (always available manually)
config.info.formats_warning: ⚠️ Modify only if you know the formats supported by the system
config.desc.search_limits: Limits for search in the Search tab (CLIP semantic + user tags)
config.info.debug_verbose: ℹ️ DEBUG messages help diagnose problems but can make the log very verbose
config.msg.reset_confirm_full:
Are you sure you want to reset ALL settings to default values?

This operation cannot be undone.
config.msg.reset_done:
Configuration reset to default values and saved!

Backup of previous configuration created.
config.tooltip.llm_output_lang:
Language in which the LLM model generates tags, descriptions and titles.
Independent from the interface language.
config.tooltip.models_dir:
Directory where AI models are saved.
Relative path (e.g.: Models) = inside the OffGallery folder.
Absolute path (e.g.: D:\AI\Models) = external folder.

⚠ Change only AFTER manually moving the Models/ folder.
config.tooltip.device:
Auto-detect: automatically detects GPU and uses CPU as fallback
Force GPU: uses GPU only (CPU fallback if unavailable)
Force CPU: completely disables GPU
config.tooltip.dinov2_threshold: Threshold for similar image search (0.0-1.0, default 0.7)
config.tooltip.llm_params_group: Expand to modify temperature, top_k and top_p of the LLM model
config.tooltip.temperature: Low values (0.1-0.3): precise and repeatable. High values (0.7+): creative but less predictable
config.tooltip.top_k: Number of candidate tokens at each step. Low values = more focused
config.tooltip.top_p: Nucleus sampling. 0.8 = considers the 80% most probable tokens
config.tooltip.num_ctx: Context window size in tokens. High values = more context but more RAM
config.tooltip.num_batch: Batch size for prompt processing. High values = faster but more RAM
config.tooltip.keep_alive: If active, Ollama keeps the model in VRAM permanently. Disable if you have low GPU memory
config.tooltip.preset_extended: Includes common RAW formats (Canon, Nikon, Sony)
config.tooltip.semantic_threshold: CLIP similarity threshold for semantic search
config.tooltip.similarity_max: Maximum number of results shown in the Search tab
config.tooltip.dinov2_low: ⚠️ Very low threshold - too many similar results
config.tooltip.dinov2_high: ⚠️ Very high threshold - few similar results
config.tooltip.semantic_low: ⚠️ Very low threshold - too many irrelevant results
config.tooltip.path_invalid: ❌ Invalid path or not an executable
gallery.progress.bioclip_loading:
Loading BioCLIP TreeOfLife model...

First run may take a few seconds.
widgets.xmp.legend:
LEGEND:
> DB only | < Sidecar only | ◀ Embedded only
✅ Synced | ⚠️ Discrepancy
widgets.xmp.import_confirm:
Sync XMP → DB for {n} items?

The XMP/embedded file is the source of truth.
Will update in DB: title, description, tags, stars (rating), color.

⚠️ Current database values will be replaced with those read from the file.
widgets.xmp.export_confirm:
Sync DB → XMP for {n} items?

The OffGallery database is the source of truth.
Will write to XMP/embedded: title, description,
tags, BioCLIP taxonomy, stars (rating), color.

🛡️ Namespaces not managed by OffGallery (crs:, xmpMM:, photoshop:, etc.)
   remain intact in the file.
widgets.xmp.single_only: Select a single item to view XMP content
widgets.xmp.xmp_empty: ℹ️ XMP present but no descriptive metadata found
widgets.msg.delete_confirm_single:
Delete '{filename}' from database?

The physical file will NOT be deleted.
widgets.msg.delete_confirm_multi:
Delete {count} images from database?

Physical files will NOT be deleted.
widgets.msg.xmp_single_only: Select a single item to view XMP content
widgets.label.tags_help: 💡 Edit all tags together - use commas to separate
widgets.label.select_tags_remove: Select tags to remove from {n} items:
widgets.label.description_help: 💡 Description will be applied to all selected items
widgets.placeholder.description_multi: New description for all selected items
widgets.label.title: Title:
widgets.placeholder.title: Enter an image title...
widgets.label.title_help: 💡 Title will be applied to all selected items
widgets.placeholder.title_multi: New title for all selected items
widgets.label.llm_info: Generate AI content for {n} items using LLM Vision
widgets.group.llm_what: What to generate (select one or more)
widgets.label.llm_params_hint: ℹ️ Parameters (max words, max tags) can be set in the Config tab
widgets.tooltip.xmp_mixed_state: MIX: Sidecar and Embedded both synced with DB
widgets.tooltip.xmp_mixed_dirty: MIX: Discrepancy detected between DB, Sidecar or Embedded
widgets.tooltip.xmp_db_only: Present only in Database (no physical XMP written)
widgets.tooltip.xmp_embedded_only: Present only as Embedded metadata (not in DB)
widgets.tooltip.xmp_sidecar_only: Present only as Sidecar file (not in DB)
export.progress.title: Export in progress...
export.check.xmp_sidecar: XMP sidecar (.xmp)  —  separate file, standard for RAW
export.tooltip.xmp_sidecar:
Creates a .xmp file next to the image with all OffGallery metadata.
Recommended for Lightroom / Darktable / Capture One workflows.
Does not modify the original file.
export.check.xmp_embedded: XMP embedded in file  (JPG / TIFF / DNG only)
export.tooltip.xmp_embedded:
Writes metadata directly into the image file.
Not supported for native RAW files (NEF, ARW, CR2, ORF…): for those files
sidecar is used automatically.
export.tooltip.dng_embedded:
DNGs support embedded writing, but the file is modified.
Enable only if you are aware of the implications.
export.tooltip.csv:
Table with all metadata: EXIF, AI, GPS, rating, tags, scores…
Useful for import into Lightroom, Capture One or spreadsheets.
export.tooltip.exclude_gps: Omits GPS coordinates from the CSV
export.tooltip.exclude_exif: Omits technical EXIF data (camera, lens, settings) from the CSV
export.tooltip.copy_originals:
Copies image files to the output directory.
Requires 'Output directory' in the Destination section.
export.tooltip.preserve_structure:
Recreates the original folder structure in the destination.
With photos from different drives, creates a subfolder for each drive:
  Windows → C_drive/  D_drive/
  macOS   → SSD/  ExternalDisk/
  Linux   → ssd/  usb/
export.tooltip.copy_overwrite:
On: overwrites files already present in the destination.
Off: files already present are skipped and counted.
export.radio.xmp_original: Next to original files  (recommended for Lightroom / Darktable)
export.tooltip.xmp_original:
The .xmp file is created in the same folder as the source file.
Lightroom and Darktable detect it automatically.
Does not require a separate output directory.
export.tooltip.xmp_single: The .xmp file is written to the output directory specified below.
export.placeholder.csv_dir: Leave empty to use the output directory above…
export.label.dir_info_xmp_copy: XMP → next to originals  ·  Copy → output directory
export.label.dir_info_both_output: XMP and copy → both in the output directory
export.group.xmp_behavior: 🔧 XMP behavior (what to do if the field already exists)
export.check.merge_keywords: Merge keywords with existing in file
export.tooltip.merge_keywords:
On: DB keywords are added to those already in the file (sidecar or embedded).
Off: existing keywords are deleted and replaced with only DB keywords.
Valid for: sidecar .xmp and embedded (JPG, TIFF, DNG).
export.check.preserve_title: Preserve Title if already in file
export.tooltip.preserve_title:
On: if the file already has a title, it is not overwritten.
Off: the DB Title always overwrites the one in the file.
Valid for: sidecar .xmp and embedded (JPG, TIFF, DNG).
export.check.preserve_description: Preserve Description if already in file
export.tooltip.preserve_description:
On: if the file already has a description, it is not overwritten.
Off: the DB Description always overwrites the one in the file.
Valid for: sidecar .xmp and embedded (JPG, TIFF, DNG).
export.check.preserve_rating: Preserve Rating (stars) if already in file
export.tooltip.preserve_rating:
On: if the file already has a rating, it is not overwritten.
Off: the DB Rating (stars) always overwrites the one in the file.
Field: XMP-xmp:Rating. Valid for: sidecar .xmp and embedded (JPG, TIFF, DNG).
export.check.preserve_color_label: Preserve Color Label if already in file
export.tooltip.preserve_color_label:
On: if the file already has a color label, it is not overwritten.
Off: the DB Color Label always overwrites the one in the file.
Field: XMP-xmp:Label (Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple).
Valid for: sidecar .xmp and embedded (JPG, TIFF, DNG).
export.label.lr_namespace_note: ✓ Lightroom namespaces (crs:, lr:, xmpMM:) always preserved
export.msg.no_operation: Select at least one operation to perform.
export.msg.missing_dir:
Specify an output directory.
Required for: {reasons}.
export.confirm.question:
Export {types} for {count} images?

📁 Destination: {location}{xmp_note}
export.msg.done_fallback: Export completed with errors in report.
